<!--
Thanks for the PR. The checklist below keeps review moving fast;
please fill in whichever items apply.

Contributing guide: ../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes, and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Fixes #123 / Refs #123 / N/A -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (additive flag / command)
- [ ] Behavior change (may be breaking pre-1.0)
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests alongside the code change.
- [ ] I updated the README / `docs/commands.md` if a user-visible
      flag or behavior changed.
- [ ] For larger changes, I added or updated an ADR in
      [`docs/adr/`](../blob/main/docs/adr/).
- [ ] Commit messages are in imperative mood and explain *why* when
      not obvious.

## Anything reviewers should look at twice?

<!-- Tricky bits, open questions, things you're not sure about. -->
